name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.6.73 CSS brace and Streamlit HTML deprecation hotfix
label: CSS brace and Streamlit HTML deprecation hotfix
release_notes: Fixes a CSS f-string brace error in the completion view styles and removes the deprecated st.components.v1.html metadata injection hook.
notes: Fixes NameError: name 'margin' is not defined from unescaped CSS braces
Removes st.components.v1.html usage to avoid the Streamlit deprecation warning
Preserves the v0.6.72 routine/project completion view functionality
